titles.title: Manifesting the Call of Jesus Christ

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: There is a calling for today The Spirit of the Lord thus say, "To the present truth, You stay," I'm challenged by the challenges of today.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Lord help me live the calling that I have Be worthy as Your Word declares Be right and stand by Your side And keep my testimony true And worship Your Name Manifesting the call of Jesus Christ

verse.name: v3
